title: Wait for Me at Udagawachô
original_title: 宇田川町で待っててよ。
overview: In bustling Shibya, Momose sees his high school classmate Yashiro. Yashiro is dressed as a girl. Momose continues to observe Yashiro and becomes attracted to him. Meanwhile, Yashiro becomes embarrassed that Momose knows that he dresses up like a girl.

trailers.title: 映画『宇田川町で待っててよ。』予告編
